title: OpenAI frontier models and Codex become available on AWS
friendlyTitle: OpenAI models are now easier to use inside AWS
summary: OpenAI said its frontier models and Codex are generally available through AWS, including Amazon Bedrock and GovCloud pathways for customers that need existing AWS security, procurement and governance controls.
friendlySummary: OpenAI’s models and Codex are now available through AWS services, giving companies another way to use them inside existing cloud systems.
whyItMatters: For enterprises, where a model is available can matter as much as what it can do. AWS availability reduces adoption friction for teams that already standardize security, billing and deployment around Amazon’s cloud.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This helps businesses use advanced AI without rebuilding their security and purchasing processes from scratch. It is a practical bridge from testing AI to using it in production.
